_comment: CONSERVATIVE DEFAULT — Allows only common safe shell commands without prompting. For unrestricted shell access, use claude-settings-power.json instead. Review the autoMode allow/soft_deny lists and adapt trusted domains to your setup. Back up your existing settings.json before replacing.

environment: **Trusted repo**: The git repository the agent started in
allow: Local Operations: File operations within project scope
Read-Only Operations: GET requests, read-only queries
Dev Servers: Starting development servers in project directory
Linting and Formatting: Running linters and formatters
Declared Dependencies: Installing from manifest files
soft_deny: Git Destructive: Force pushing, deleting remote branches
Cloud Storage Mass Delete: Bulk deleting cloud storage
